matrix_boundaries.restricted_research_mode_usable: research-mode reporting only; no downstream authorization
matrix_boundaries.framework_level_randomization_candidate: candidate only; no production p-value, CI, TrustReport, or CalibrationSignal
matrix_boundaries.per_cell_marginal_only: per-cell readout only; no global/winner/pooled claim
matrix_boundaries.contract_candidate: contract-level candidate only; no inference authorization
matrix_boundaries.multiplicity_or_dependence_unresolved: blocked from downstream until dependence/multiplicity evidence exists
matrix_boundaries.blocked: not allowed for governed causal evidence

warnings: Method-readiness matrix v2 is an evidence-index only — not production authorization, TrustReport expansion, CalibrationSignal, or downstream decisioning.

SCM treated-set placebo integration defined as framework candidate

SCM single-treated placebo is null-monitor/falsification only

TBRRidge KFold tuning rejected as production inference

LOTO is sensitivity analysis only — not multi-treated placebo inference
